findings: Banned models are rejected at metaswarm launch time, but runtime verification of actual child model use is not enforced beyond telemetry logging.
Depth Guard is documented/prompted rather than implemented as code-level enforcement in stampede.sh.
Partial status is instructed in commander prompts, but launcher code does not validate bundle status against actual worker launch counts.
Smoke test checks banned_child_models metadata presence but does not execute a negative banned-model rejection test.
